title: Coordinate Bar
description: Displays your current coordinates in the action bar.
body:
# 📍 Coordinate Bar

**Coordinate Bar** is a simple Minecraft datapack that shows your current coordinates (`X`, `Y`, `Z`) in the action bar.

![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/t4Fz8l6K/images/36eb36288ca66e41f0ad58bb9e6f3999bef22617.png)
## ✨ Features

- Shows coordinates in real-time.
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer.
- Supports [Smithed Actionbar Libary](https://smithed.net/packs/actionbar).

## 📦 Optional Library Support – **Actionbar**  

This [datapack](https://smithed.net/packs/actionbar) allows the **actionbar to be shared across multiple datapacks** on a server, preventing conflicts and ensuring compatibility.  

🔗 **Download:** [Smithed – Actionbar Library](https://api.smithed.dev/v2/download?pack=actionbar&mode=datapack)  

- **Enable support with the following command:**  ``scoreboard players set .library thirstbar 1``

- **Disable support with the following command:**  ``scoreboard players set .library thirstbar 0``

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.
2. Place it in your world's `datapacks` folder.
3. Use `/reload` after joining the world.
4. You're all set! Move around and see your coordinates at the bottom of your screen.

## 🧱 Compatibility

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.20.2+
- No external resource packs needed
-
